#This file was generated by AncestryDNA
# AncestryDNA array version: V2.0
#
# Synthetic dual-upload fixture for one simulated individual (S2 = AncestryDNA leg).
# Pairs with sample_dual_upload_individual/23andme.txt; expected merge concordance
# counts are hand-curated in expected_concordance.json. All genotypes are
# re-synthesized from coordinates; no real user genotypes are present.
#
#This raw data file may be used for personal or research purposes.
#Below is a text version of your data. Fields are TAB-separated.
#Each line corresponds to a single SNP. For each SNP, we provide its identifier
#(an rsid or an internal id), its location on a reference human assembly
#(chromosome and position), and the two alleles observed at this position.
rsid	chromosome	position	allele1	allele2
rs1001	1	100000	A	A
rs1002	1	200000	G	A
rs1003	1	300000	C	C
rs1004	1	400000	0	0

rs1007	1	700000	T	T
